Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 231}{f 1 3 114} will display a map of your current location and {f 0 1 2}shortcuts that will allow you to fast travel{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}When it's displayed, you can open the town map directly from the shortcut selection screen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Some shortcut destinations or even the shortcut function itself may be unavailable in certain situations.[n]{f 1 1}
